# ACLAS Global

> ACLAS Global is an OTHM candidate centre preparing online diploma programmes for flexible learners worldwide.

## Programmes

- [Programmes](https://aclas.global/courses): Overview of online OTHM diploma levels, credits, subject areas, and typical study durations.
- [Level 3 Business](https://aclas.global/level-3-business): Foundation business diploma for school leavers and career changers, with 60 credits and online study.
- [Level 4+5 Business](https://aclas.global/level-4-5-business-management): Business management pathway covering 240 credits and progression toward a bachelor's degree top-up.
- [Level 4+5 Health and Social Care](https://aclas.global/level-4-5-health-social-care): Health and social care management pathway covering 240 credits and progression options.
- [Level 4+5 Information Technology](https://aclas.global/level-4-5-information-technology): Information technology pathway covering programming, cybersecurity, cloud computing, and data analytics.
- [Level 6 Business](https://aclas.global/level-6-business-management): Final-year level business management diploma with 120 credits and online tutor support.
- [Level 7 Strategic Management](https://aclas.global/level-7-strategic-management): Postgraduate-level strategic management diploma for MBA or master's progression.

## Admissions and Study

- [How It Works](https://aclas.global/how-it-works): Step-by-step explanation of online study, Moodle access, tutor support, assessment, and certification.
- [University Progression](https://aclas.global/university-progression): Explains how OTHM diplomas may support advanced entry to bachelor's, top-up, master's, or MBA routes.
- [FAQ](https://aclas.global/faq): Answers common questions about OTHM, entry requirements, fees, online learning, assessment, and progression.
- [Contact](https://aclas.global/contact): Enquiry form and direct contact details for programme advice and admissions questions.

## Trust and Policies

- [About](https://aclas.global/about): Background on ACLAS Global, its candidate-centre status, online delivery model, and learner support.
- [Policies](https://aclas.global/policies): Public policy hub covering assessment, appeals, complaints, quality assurance, data protection, and learner support.
- [Assessment Policy](https://aclas.global/assessment): Rules for fair assessment, assignment marking, feedback, resubmission, and quality checks.
- [Appeals Policy](https://aclas.global/appeals): Learner appeal stages, evidence requirements, review process, and escalation routes.
- [Privacy Policy](https://aclas.global/privacy): How ACLAS Global collects, uses, protects, and stores personal data.

## Key Facts

- Official name: ACLAS Global International Education Group.
- Short name: ACLAS Global.
- Status: OTHM candidate centre; programmes are prospective and subject to approval.
- Study mode: Online learning through Moodle with tutor and assessor support.
- Main qualification levels: OTHM Level 3, Level 4, Level 5, Level 6, and Level 7.
- Subject areas: Business management, health and social care management, information technology, and education and training.
- Office: 8735 Dunwoody Place, Suite R, Atlanta, GA 30350, United States.
- Website: https://aclas.global/

## Contact

- Website: https://aclas.global/
- Email: info@aclas.global
- Contact page: https://aclas.global/contact
